name: @orrgal1/forge
description: Self-contained forge chain for a PR — no dependency on other plugins. /forge runs the arc end-to-end: start → goals (AWAIT_GOALS_REVIEW) → design (AWAIT_DESIGN_REVIEW) → scenarios (AWAIT_SCENARIOS_REVIEW) → tests → impl → audit-green → ci-green → review-green → final-ci → READY. Modes: auto (pause at goals + design + scenarios), manual (pause every phase); resume via /forge approve and /forge iterate "<feedback>". /forge-setup maps host-repo tooling (build/test/lint/typecheck/codegen/devenv/localenv) into $FORGE_HOME; every skill resolves repo commands through it, so forge adopts into any repo with zero coupling. /forge-start opens the chain (brief → sentinel commit → draft PR). /forge-goals captures intended end-state; /forge-scenarios drafts when:/then: scenarios (component-tier-observable); /forge-validations drafts checkable predicates for removal/structural goals with no runtime observable (a goal needs ≥1 proof — scenario or validation); /forge-tests writes/attaches a component-tier test per scenario; /forge-design maps each scenario to design elements. /forge-audit aggregates the attestation chain: goals loyal to source → covered by ≥1 proof → scenario attached to a real test → body matches when/then + AAA → linked tests pass → validations hold. Per-layer attestation: /forge-verify-{goals,scenarios,tests,match,runs,validations}. Fix-loops: /forge-impl-green (tests green), /forge-audit-green (audit PASS), /forge-ci-green (CI green), /forge-review-green (0 open findings, every severity). /forge-review fans out review channels in parallel — lens-fanout + always-on /code-review and /security-review; custom via $FORGE_HOME/review-channels/ — to one ranked verdict. /forge-map builds JSON domain snapshots (db/api/events/config via /forge-map-{db,api,events,config}, plus ad-hoc) under $FORGE_HOME/maps/main/ with lazy branch forks that absorb on merge. /forge-tool packages ad-hoc flows into reusable tools under $FORGE_HOME/tools/<name> (script / instructions / dir / agent forms). All repo state lives at $FORGE_HOME (default ~/.claude/forge/<repo-key>/) so worktrees share state. Artifacts under .pr-artifacts/<branch-slug>/forge/.
